textByHashes.bfb87c40d824ec417b6bdbfd219281b242a21763: Watering the pretty flowers, you want to help?
textByHashes.f2901ff552cd2b19fec0786ef150c70e891a7c6a: Pft, you should take time to enjoy the simple things.
